1481:
WITH LowConsumptionCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM 
        customers c
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment, c.CustomerID
),
RankedCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        TotalConsumption,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC) AS ConsumptionRank
    FROM 
        LowConsumptionCustomers
),
LowestConsumptionCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        TotalConsumption
    FROM 
        RankedCustomers
    WHERE 
        ConsumptionRank = 1
),
AnnualAverageConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(TotalConsumption) / COUNT(CustomerID) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
    FROM 
        LowestConsumptionCustomers
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    a1.AvgAnnualConsumption - a2.AvgAnnualConsumption AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    a2.AvgAnnualConsumption - a3.AvgAnnualConsumption AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    a3.AvgAnnualConsumption - a1.AvgAnnualConsumption AS KAM_SME_Difference
FROM 
    AnnualAverageConsumption a1
JOIN 
    AnnualAverageConsumption a2 ON a1.Segment = 'SME' AND a2.Segment = 'LAM'
JOIN 
    AnnualAverageConsumption a3 ON a2.Segment = 'LAM' AND a3.Segment = 'KAM';

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2013,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y1 ON c.CustomerID = y1.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageIncrease DESC;
